final:
// // This module controls the fan speed based on the temperature sensor input. The device has four speed settings: 00 (On), 01 (High), 10 (Low), and 11 (Off). The fan speed should decrease as the input temperature increases.
module fan_speed_controller(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [1:0] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Off
        end else begin
            case (temperature)
                2'b00: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Off
                2'b01: fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Low
                2'b10: fan_speed <= 2'b10; // Medium
                2'b11: fan_speed <= 2'b11; // High
                default: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Default to Off
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module controls the fan speed based on the temperature sensor input. The device has four speed settings: 00 (On), 01 (High), 10 (Low), and 11 (Off). The fan speed should decrease as the input temperature increases.
